objective: Advance the pure SW industry index research system to V2.0 by downgrading standalone oversold bottom-fishing to a rejected baseline and testing conditional industry reversal with market-regime gates, momentum-trap filters, non-overlapping backtests, portfolio NAV, and benchmark-relative validation.

acceptance_checks.description: Run the V2.0 conditional industry reversal backtest from the V1.8 historical feature panel.
Audit that V2.0 uses the compact output layout.
acceptance_checks.command: python .\scripts\audit_compact_output_layout.py --output-dir .\outputs\industry_conditional_reversal_backtest --required-debug-files conditional_signal_panel.csv event_backtest.csv nonoverlap_backtest.csv portfolio_nav.csv benchmark_relative_nav.csv regime_breakdown.csv walk_forward_oos.csv parameter_sensitivity.csv momentum_trap_cases.csv signal_rejection_log.csv

acceptance_checks.description: Audit task brief governance after V2.0 migration.

decision_boundary: V2.0 remains research-only. Pure oversold and simple stabilized oversold are rejected as standalone industry selection signals unless future evidence passes full-sample, out-of-sample, non-overlapping, benchmark-relative, and sample-size gates.
research_boundary: Research-only validation; no individual stocks, no trading signal, no order generation, no sample data, and no validated alpha promotion.
